label: Free Demo Website
description: Free demo first — $700 one-time + $50/month support after approval

default.subject: Quick idea for {{NAME}}'s website
default.body:
Hi {{NAME}},

I came across {{NAME}} while looking at {{TYPE}} businesses in {{CITY}} and wanted to reach out.

We build local business websites as a free demo first — you see the full site before paying anything. If you like it, it's $700 one-time to go live, then $50/month for updates and support. If you don't like it, you pay nothing.

Happy to start whenever suits you — just reply to this email.

Best regards,

{{PRODUCT_LABEL}}
